ocr_text: SPEAK FOR YOURSELF, GOALIE MAN. HEY DONNIE! DID MIKEY HAPPEN TO COME ALONG?
speaker: Casey Jones
textWithCues: [Cocky taunt] Speak for yourself, goalie man. [Calls out cheerfully] Hey Donnie! Did Mikey happen to come along?

ocr_text: ...BUT DIMENSION X IS A BIG PLACE, AND IT ONLY HAS SO MANY RANGERS TO PROTECT IT. NICE OF YOU TO BRING SOME MORE BAD GUYS WITH YOU. THE NEUTRINOS COULD USE A BREAK FROM CHASING DOWN WHAT'S LEFT OF KRANG'S ARMY.
speaker: Casey Jones
textWithCues: [Energetic] ...But Dimension X is a big place, and it only has so many Rangers to protect it. [Sarcastically] Nice of you to bring some more bad guys with you. The Neutrinos could use a break from chasing down what's left of Krang's army.
